arch.aes.desc: AES (Advanced Encryption Standard) qo' naQ lo'bogh ta', ngaQ, 'ej QI' peH mIw 'oH. 256 ngaSruq 'ab bit — 2256 ngaSruq tu'lu', HoS ngoH laHbe'. GCM (Galois/Counter Mode) 'ay'moH peH chel — peH neH Qapbe', ngoq choHlu'pu''a' je tu'.

peH ngaSruq — De'wI'Daq ratlh, URL pergh lo'lu'

De'wI' ghItlh Segh — ngoq Segh polbe'lu'
ngoq poSmoH — ngoq peH neH ngeHlu'
IP HablI' teH — polpa' Hash lo'lu'
arch.server_never.title: yaHwI' leghbe'

ngeH pong — mIw 12 Degh
peH byte — mIw De' pIm tu'laHbe'
IP Hash — SHA-256 IP + jaj tIq choH
poH Degh — ghorgh ngeH chenmoHlu'
De'wI' ghItlh 'ab — ngoq peH blob 'ab (byte)

arch.step1.desc: De'wI' ghItlh DawIvDI', De'wI'lIj mIw 256-bit AES ngaSruq chenmoH Web Crypto API (crypto.subtle.generateKey) lo'lu'. jan De'wI' Hung mIw mI' lo'. ngaSruq De'wI'lIj qawHaqDaq neH tu'lu'.
arch.step1.title: ngaSruq chenmoH
arch.step2.desc: 12-byte IV (Initialisation Vector) mIw chenmoHlu' (crypto.getRandomValues). De'wI' ghItlh rap cha'logh peHchugh ngoq pIm chenmoH IV. IV pegh 'oHbe' — ngoq peH yor chellu' 'ej ngoq tlhej ngeHlu'.
arch.step2.title: IV chenmoH
arch.step3.desc: De'wI'Daq De'wI' ghItlh peHlu' crypto.subtle.encrypt lo'lu' AES-GCM mIw, ngaSruq chenmoHlu'bogh, 'ej IV. ngoq peH + 128-bit 'ay'moH per 'oH. 'ay'moH per GCM naQ lay' 'oH — ngoq peH wa' bit choHlu'chugh, peghHa' luj.
arch.step3.title: peH
arch.step4.desc: ngoq peH (IV + ngoq peH + 'ay'moH per) neH yaHwI' ngeHlu'. mIw byte blob Hev yaHwI'. ngeH pong (mIw 12 Degh) nob 'ej ngoq peH pol. De'wI' ghItlh pong pagh, ngoq Segh pagh, ngaSruq pagh — peH byte neH.
arch.step4.title: yIngeH
